ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Asia, Europe, US, UK, JP, KR/CN) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code used in the region */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region */,
  "shipping_cost_per_km" REAL /* Cost per kilometer for shipping in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shoe_models" (
  "shoe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shoe model */,
  "shoe_name" TEXT /* Name of the shoe model (e.g., Nike Air Max, Adidas Superstar) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shoe model */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the shoe model */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the shoe model */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the shoe is designed (e.g., men, women, unisex) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the shoe model was released */,
  "retirement_date" TEXT /* Date when the shoe model is discontinued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shoe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shoe_models_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shoe_models_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shoe_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shoe size */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "shoe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shoe model */,
  "size_value" REAL /* Value of the shoe size (e.g., 34, 35, 36) */,
  "length_cm" REAL /* Length of the foot in centimeters */,
  "width" TEXT /* Width of the shoe size (e.g., narrow, wide) */,
  "in_stock" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the size is in stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shoe_sizes_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shoe_sizes_shoe_id FOREIGN KEY ("shoe_id") REFERENCES shoe_models ("shoe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "region1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first region */,
  "region2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second region */,
  "shoe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shoe model */,
  "size1_value" REAL /* Value of the shoe size in the first region */,
  "size2_value" REAL /* Value of the shoe size in the second region */,
  "conversion_type" TEXT /* Type of conversion (e.g., standard, custom) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_region2_id FOREIGN KEY ("region2_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_shoe_id FOREIGN KEY ("shoe_id") REFERENCES shoe_models ("shoe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_region1_id FOREIGN KEY ("region1_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's region */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "shoe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shoe model */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the order (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used (e.g., standard, express) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shoe_id FOREIGN KEY ("shoe_id") REFERENCES shoe_models ("shoe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shoe size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item at the time of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES shoe_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment processor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_addresses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping address */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was sent */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES shipping_addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand (e.g., Nike, Adidas) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., running, basketball) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
